exploration_notes: Prometheus delegates BasicAuth middleware and TLS client certificate validation to the external `prometheus/exporter-toolkit/web` package (not in this repo). The integration points are: (1) `web/web.go` — `Handler.Run()` calls `toolkit_web.ServeMultiple()` with the web config file path (line 760), and the `Options` struct carries `EnableAdminAPI`; (2) `cmd/prometheus/main.go` — parses `--web.config.file` (line 405-408) for TLS/auth config, `--web.enable-admin-api` (line 434-435), and calls `tool
